---
title: "final_project"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
url <- "https://opendoorsdata.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/OD25_US-Study-Abroad_Tables.xlsx"
download.file(url, destfile = "open_doors.xlsx", mode = "wb")
excel_sheets("open_doors.xlsx")
df <- read_excel("open_doors.xlsx", sheet = 2)
```
